meta.title: Yuzheng Sun / 课代表立正 public profile facts
meta.scope: Public, reusable facts. Volatile metrics require date checks.

identity.core_proposition_en: Help individuals and organizations build AI systems that compound, so they can act on the opportunities of the AI era.
identity.core_proposition_zh: 帮助个人与企业建立能够复利的 AI 系统，真正行动起来，抓住 AI 时代的机会。
identity.throughline_en: I don't worship abstract intelligence; I care about judgment meeting reality early, and systems that compound.
identity.throughline_zh: 我不迷信抽象的聪明；我更在意的是，让判断尽早穿透现实，并长成复利的系统。

career.detail: Led a 30-person data and AI team

career.role: Principal Data Scientist and sole evangelist
career.detail: Statsig was acquired by OpenAI in 2025

metrics.label: public conversations with researchers, founders, executives, investors, and operators
public learner project posts
metrics.source: Private Circle Admin API count; public community at https://www.superlinear.academy/

books.title: 真本事：从会工作到会赚钱

dated_judgments.claim: A new natural-language interface to data and computation, with implications including lower inference cost, tool use and agents, memory, private search, copilots, and AI-native systems.
The most important near-term shift in AI, with a meaningful 10–18 month opportunity window.
Major structural flaws; the hype exceeded what the protocol could reliably deliver.
The product category would not last, although trying it remained useful for understanding the capability shift.

endorsements.name: Liu Jia
endorsements.role: Chair Professor, Tsinghua University; cognitive neuroscientist
endorsements.quote: 立正分享的不只是工具，而是思维哲学——这才是 AI 时代最稀缺、最有价值的东西。他的课程让我这个科学家也深受启发。

endorsements.name: Wei Manfredi
endorsements.role: Senior Vice President, AI & Architecture, IHG Hotels & Resorts
endorsements.quote: Yuzheng has built an AI education community that is carefully curated, practical, and unusually useful for people doing real work.

endorsements.name: Vijaye Raji
endorsements.role: Founder, Statsig; CTO of Applications, OpenAI
endorsements.quote: Yuzheng distills years of product growth wisdom into actionable insight — helping data scientists surface decisive signals, PMs turn numbers into strategy, and founders find a repeatable path to compounding PMF.

endorsements.name: Dai Yusen
endorsements.quote: 立正是真正的 AI Native Pioneer——他用独特的思维框架，带领更多人在 AI 时代实现超线性成长。

outcomes.subject: Marvin, Developer at Yipi Tech
outcomes.result: A tool built with the builder mindset earned back roughly twice the cohort fee.
outcomes.boundary: The public review verifies the two-times outcome. Roughly two months is inferred from cohort and review dates, not quoted from the review.

outcomes.subject: AgentKey
outcomes.result: 60 visits, 48 activations, and 12 paid users after an early community launch; 28 likes and 51 comments as checked on 2026-07-04.

outcomes.subject: Dymon Asia
outcomes.result: Multiple roles posted in the community and two community members reported as hired.
outcomes.boundary: The two-member result is supported by a private screenshot retained in the proof archive; link points to the public role.
